-- E-049: Sheep, Female, Purchased 2024-11-04, Acquired 2025-11-04, Group F1 (Fattening Pen 1=1), Category Ewe=4, Dead 2026-03-31
-- Weight at acquisition: 18 kg, Purchase cost: 546 EGP
INSERT INTO animals (animalId, speciesId, categoryId, groupId, statusId, sex, acquisitionType, acquisitionDate, birthDate, purchaseCost, weightAtAcquisition, exitDate, exitReason, isActive, createdAt, updatedAt)
VALUES ('E-049', 1, 4, 1, 3, 'female', 'purchased', '2025-11-04', '2024-11-04', 546, 18, '2026-03-31', 'dead', 0, NOW(), NOW());

-- K-009: Goat, Male, Purchased 2025-01-15, Acquired 2026-01-24, Group B2 (Breeding Unit B=8), Category Baby Goat=7, Dead 2026-02-25
-- Weight at acquisition: 15 kg, Purchase cost: 474 EGP
INSERT INTO animals (animalId, speciesId, categoryId, groupId, statusId, sex, acquisitionType, acquisitionDate, birthDate, purchaseCost, weightAtAcquisition, exitDate, exitReason, isActive, createdAt, updatedAt)
VALUES ('K-009', 2, 7, 8, 3, 'male', 'purchased', '2026-01-24', '2025-01-15', 474, 15, '2026-02-25', 'Dead', 0, NOW(), NOW());

-- Verify
SELECT animalId, isActive, exitDate, exitReason FROM animals WHERE animalId IN ('E-049', 'K-009');
